findings.evidence: `rg` hit: line 65 has `@[implicit_reducible]` on `def instGroupLike`; lines 75-85 already provide `@[simp] instGroupLike_coact` and `@[simp] groupLikeCoact_apply` as the intended public characterization.
findings.fix: Remove the reducibility attribute from `instGroupLike`; if any downstream proof then needs unfolding, add the missing explicit characteristic lemma instead.
findings.issue: `instGroupLike` is marked `@[implicit_reducible]`, so consumers can rely on the implementation of the comodule record during elaboration/typeclass search rather than the public coaction API.

summary: The characteristic lemmas are present, but the group-like comodule structure is still made reducible instead of forcing downstream code through that API.
